message:
test(distributed): add 58 edge case tests for token validation, readiness evaluation, and credential resolution (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Covers validate_token identity matching (case-insensitive, colon parsing,
client identity cross-check), configured_token_source_kind detection,
resolve_expected_token from inline/file/missing/ambiguous/empty sources,
evaluate_readiness for all config branches (loopback, TLS, auth, allowlist,
bind addr, aggregate counts), security error codes, and serde roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
